mapper.sql: select id, biz_code, trigger_event, action_type, target_field, target_value, condition_expr, callback_url, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from lc_biz_post_action
mapper.select: where biz_code = #{bizCode} and del_flag = '0' and status = '0' order by sort_order asc, id asc
where biz_code = #{bizCode} and trigger_event = #{triggerEvent} and del_flag = '0' and status = '0' order by sort_order asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into lc_biz_post_action( biz_code, trigger_event, action_type, target_field, target_value, condition_expr, callback_url, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{bizCode}, #{triggerEvent}, #{actionType}, #{targetField}, #{targetValue}, #{conditionExpr}, #{callbackUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )
